elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)

Diagonal sloped roofline visible in side view above the gridF end, with a small angle label (appears to read a rotated digit, possibly '6' for the roof's 6-degree slope noted on the roof plan, หน้า08) and a 1.50m overhang dimension at the gridA end
two window openings tagged circled '2', upper floor, west side (near gridE-gridD)

twin window openings tagged hexagon '3' side by side, upper floor, center (near gridD-gridC) -- likely the awning-type W3 windows lighting a stairwell or bathroom, matching the door/window schedule's W3 entry
two more window openings tagged circled '2', upper floor, east-center (near gridC-gridB)

small gable-shaped 'V' feature with horizontal hatch/step lines drawn near grid A on the upper-right, alongside the callout 'ราวกันตก R1 A-23 ดูแบบขยาย' -- plausibly a side view of the ST1 entrance-stair/guardrail feature found 2.05m south of grid A on the ground floor plan (หน้า06) and confirmed dimensioned again on this very elevation's own bottom dimension chain (see grid-relevant warning below).
circled '2' tagged door opening, ground floor, west end (near gridF-gridE) -- main entry door with sidelight/glazed panel, diagonal sightline drawn
two window openings tagged hexagon '4', ground floor, west-center (near gridE-gridD and gridD-gridC)
window opening tagged circled '2', ground floor, center (near gridC)

large diagonally cross-hatched ('X') panel spanning both floor levels near grid B-A -- likely the same open จอดรถ (carport) bay seen from its side/perpendicular face on this elevation, matching the equivalent X-hatch panel on รูปด้าน 1 (หน้า09)
'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal-line notes, one at the upper-floor level line (near roof-beam), one at the ground-floor level line

Several small triangle symbols each containing '1', scattered across the facade at various heights -- same recurring unidentified marker convention seen on รูปด้าน 1 (หน้า09) and sister houses' equivalent elevations.

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT DUMMY-GRID CONFIRMATION (reporting only, master file not edited): this elevation's own bottom dimension chain reads (left to right, F to A then beyond): '1.00 | 2.00 | 3.70 | 2.20 | 3.70 | 1.80' bracketed as '13.40' (gridF to gridA, matching the master grid's y_lines exactly), followed immediately by a separate '2.05' dimension beyond grid A -- this independently corroborates, on a THIRD sheet (after the ground-floor plan หน้า06 and the grid master's own structural source), the exact 2.05m dummy-grid offset south of grid A ('Aprime' in the master gridline file). The small gable/step-hatch icon drawn at that exact location on this elevation (see 'gable_stair_feature' above, tagged with the ราวกันตก/R1/A-23 guardrail callout) is consistent with this being the ST1 entrance-stair feature identified on the ground floor plan, not a carport/terrace slab.

This elevation (รูปด้าน 2, A-08) is drawn along the depth direction (parallel to the F-E-D-C-B-A grid rows), the long side of the building, unlike รูปด้าน 1 (A-07, หน้า09) which was drawn along the width direction (1-2-3-4 grid columns).

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '2' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-08) -- cardinal direction not independently confirmed from this sheet alone, only the sheet-to-slot mapping.

The large diagonally-hatched 'X' panel near grid B-A most plausibly represents the same open carport (จอดรถ) bay flagged on รูปด้าน 1, viewed here from its perpendicular/side face -- flagged rather than confirmed given the resolution.

The recurring small triangle-'1' markers remain unidentified against the symbol legend (หน้า03), consistent with the same open question flagged on รูปด้าน 1 and sister houses' equivalent elevation sheets.
